WhyItMatters: Connects evidence across email, identity, endpoint, network, and alert telemetry using shared entities such as user, device, IP, URL, and message ID.
ReviewSteps: Start with the strongest entity: user, device, IP, URL/domain, or message ID.
Pivot across email, identity, endpoint, cloud, and alert evidence.
Document missing signals as visibility gaps.
Promote repeatable low-noise logic into candidate detections.
ExpectedResults: Rows provide pivot points and cross-layer correlations for deeper investigation.
NoResultsMeaning: No correlation telemetry was returned, or one or more required telemetry layers are unavailable.
RecommendedActions: Use returned entities to pivot into the next telemetry layer.
Validate source health and telemetry coverage.
Document gaps and candidate detection opportunities.
